name: Scope Guard
description: Before write operations, verify the change belongs to the current spec and does not violate canon rules.

then.prompt: Before writing, verify: 1) This change belongs to the current spec (ops-004b-full-mvp-funnel-build). 2) It does not create a new repo or Vercel project. 3) It does not require paid AI keys (OpenAI/Anthropic). 4) It does not invent fake social/order links. 5) It does not delete canon data from data/canon/. 6) It does not rename locked districts or characters. 7) It does not redesign unrelated pages. If all checks pass, proceed with the write.
